Package org.eventb.core.seqprover

Interface IReasonerInput

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractAllD.Input, AbstractManualRewrites.Input, AbstrExpr.Input, AdversarialReasoner.Input, AllI.Input, DTDistinctCase.Input, EmptyInput, ExF.Input, ExtendedInput, ForwardInfHypsReasoner.Input, ForwardInfReasoner.Input, HypothesesReasoner.Input, HypothesisReasoner.Input, LocalEqRewrite.Input, MngHyp.Input, MultipleExprInput, MultiplePredInput, PFunSetInput, PPInput, PredicatePositionReasoner.Input, Review.Input, SingleExprInput, SinglePredInput, SingleStringInput, TotalDomRewrites.Input, XProverInput
public interface IReasonerInput
Common protocol for reasoner inputs.

This interface is intended to be implemented by clients. Typically each reasoner implements its own input class, although they may be shared in case the inputs are the same.

Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • IReasoner
  • IReasonerInputReader
  • IReasonerInputWriter

    Applies the given free variable renaming to the reasoner input.

    Returns the cause of the error in constructing the reasoner input.

    Returns true iff there was an error while constructing the reasoner input.

  • Method Details

    • hasError

      boolean hasError()
      Returns true iff there was an error while constructing the reasoner input.
      Returns:
      true iff there was an error while constructing the reasoner input.

    • getError

      String getError()
      Returns the cause of the error in constructing the reasoner input.
      Returns:
      the cause of the error, or null in case there was no error in constructing the reasoner input.

    • applyHints

      void applyHints(ReplayHints renaming)
      Applies the given free variable renaming to the reasoner input.
      Parameters:
      renaming - the renaming to apply.
